name: parallax
description: Governed trading thesis council with lifecycle monitoring, paper trading, and permissioned execution gates.

scripts.analyze: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js analyze
scripts.policy: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js policy
scripts.library: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js library
scripts.watchlist: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js watchlist
scripts.alerts: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js alerts
scripts.alert-prefs: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js alert-prefs
scripts.notifications: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js notifications
scripts.paper-open: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js paper-open
scripts.paper-close: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js paper-close
scripts.paper-ledger: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js paper-ledger
scripts.paper-review: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js paper-review
scripts.team-init: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js team-init
scripts.team-report: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js team-report
scripts.team-export: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js team-export
scripts.partner-report: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js partner-report
scripts.beta-init: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js beta-init
scripts.beta-readiness: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js beta-readiness
scripts.beta-status: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js beta-status
scripts.beta-serve: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js beta-serve
scripts.saas-init: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js saas-init
scripts.saas-readiness: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js saas-readiness
scripts.saas-status: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js saas-status
scripts.saas-export: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js saas-export
scripts.app: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js app
scripts.data-status: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js data-status
scripts.llm-eval: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js llm-eval
scripts.prompt-registry: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js prompt-registry
scripts.demo: npm run build --silent && node dist/src/cli/parallax.js analyze --symbol NVDA --horizon swing --thesis "post-earnings continuation with controlled risk" --ceiling watchlist
